title: clypeola suffrutescens
intro: Clypeola suffrutescens, also known as the "earth chestnut" or "earth almond", is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Clypeola suffrutescens is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine in the form of dried roots and rhizomes.
